# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

- 200
          - 202
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.enabled
      register: manual_fs_snapshot
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - manual
        - filesystem

    - name: Snapshot - Create manual snapshot (S3)
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.name }}/manual-snapshot-{{ timestamp }}"
        method: PUT
        body_format: json
        body:
          indices: "*"
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: true
          metadata:
            taken_by: "operations-team"
            reason: "manual-backup"
            timestamp: "{{ ansible_date_time.iso8601 }}"
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 202
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.enabled
      register: manual_s3_snapshot
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - manual
        - s3

    - name: Snapshot - Execute SLM policy immediately (daily full)
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/policy/{{ snapshot_configuration.policies.daily_full.name }}/_execute"
        method: POST
        status_code: 200
      register: execute_policy_result
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - execute

    - name: Snapshot - Display executed policy result
      debug:
        var: execute_policy_result.json
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - execute

    # ============================================
    # SNAPSHOT MONITORING
    # ============================================
    - name: Monitor - Check snapshot status
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/_status"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: snapshot_status
      tags:
        - monitor
        - status

    - name: Monitor - Display snapshot status
      debug:
        var: snapshot_status.json
      tags:
        - monitor
        - status

    - name: Monitor - List all snapshots in filesystem repo
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.name }}/_all"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: fs_snapshots
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.enabled
      ignore_errors: true
      tags:
        - monitor
        - list

    - name: Monitor - List all snapshots in S3 repo
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.name }}/_all"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: s3_snapshots
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.enabled
      ignore_errors: true
      tags:
        - monitor
        - list

    - name: Monitor - Get SLM statistics
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/stats"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: slm_stats
      tags:
        - monitor
        - stats

    - name: Monitor - Display SLM statistics
      debug:
        var: slm_stats.json
      tags:
        - monitor
        - stats

    - name: Monitor - Check cluster health
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_cluster/health"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: cluster_health
      tags:
        - monitor
        - health

    - name: Monitor - Display cluster health
      debug:
        msg: |
          Cluster: {{ cluster_health.json.cluster_name }}
          Status: {{ cluster_health.json.status }}
          Nodes: {{ cluster_health.json.number_of_nodes }}
          Active Shards: {{ cluster_health.json.active_shards }}
          Relocating Shards: {{ cluster_health.json.relocating_shards }}
      tags:
        - monitor
        - health

    # ============================================
    # WAIT FOR SNAPSHOT COMPLETION
    # ============================================
    - name: Wait - Poll snapshot until completion (filesystem)
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.name }}/manual-snapshot-{{ timestamp }}"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: snapshot_poll
      until: >
        snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].state is defined and
        snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].state in ['SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'PARTIAL']
      retries: 120
      delay: 10
      when:
        - snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.enabled
        - manual_fs_snapshot is defined
        - manual_fs_snapshot is success
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - wait

    - name: Wait - Display final snapshot state
      debug:
        msg: |
          Snapshot: {{ snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].snapshot }}
          State: {{ snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].state }}
          Indices: {{ snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].indices | length }}
          Duration: {{ snapshot_poll.json.snapshots[0].duration_in_millis | default(0) }}ms
      when: snapshot_poll is defined and snapshot_poll is success
      tags:
        - snapshot
        - wait

---
# Restoration playbook
# Save as: playbooks/snapshot-restore.yml

- name: Elasticsearch Snapshot Restoration
  hosts: localhost
  gather_facts: true
  vars_files:
    - "../config/snapshot-config.yml"

  vars:
    es_host: "{{ snapshot_configuration.cluster.elasticsearch_hosts[0] }}"
    restore_repository: "{{ restore_repo | default('fs_backup_repo') }}"
    restore_snapshot: "{{ snapshot_name | default('latest') }}"
    restore_profile: "{{ profile | default('full_restore') }}"
    restore_indices: "{{ indices | default('*') }}"
    target_rename_prefix: "{{ rename_prefix | default('') }}"

  tasks:
    # ============================================
    # PRE-RESTORATION CHECKS
    # ============================================
    - name: Pre-check - Verify cluster health
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_cluster/health"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: pre_health
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Fail if cluster is red
      fail:
        msg: "Cluster health is RED. Cannot proceed with restoration."
      when: pre_health.json.status == "red"
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Display cluster health warning
      debug:
        msg: "WARNING: Cluster health is YELLOW. Proceeding with caution."
      when: pre_health.json.status == "yellow"
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Verify repository exists
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 404
      register: repo_check
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Fail if repository not found
      fail:
        msg: "Repository '{{ restore_repository }}' not found. Please register the repository first."
      when: repo_check.status == 404
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Get available snapshots
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}/_all"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: available_snapshots
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Display available snapshots
      debug:
        msg: |
          Available snapshots in '{{ restore_repository }}':
          {% for snap in available_snapshots.json.snapshots %}
          - {{ snap.snapshot }} (State: {{ snap.state }}, Indices: {{ snap.indices | length }})
          {% endfor %}
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Determine latest snapshot
      set_fact:
        actual_snapshot: >-
          {{ available_snapshots.json.snapshots | sort(attribute='start_time_in_millis') | last | attr('snapshot') }}
      when: restore_snapshot == 'latest'
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Use specified snapshot name
      set_fact:
        actual_snapshot: "{{ restore_snapshot }}"
      when: restore_snapshot != 'latest'
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Display selected snapshot
      debug:
        msg: "Selected snapshot for restoration: {{ actual_snapshot }}"
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Get snapshot details
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}/{{ actual_snapshot }}"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: snapshot_details
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Verify snapshot is successful
      fail:
        msg: "Snapshot '{{ actual_snapshot }}' state is {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].state }}. Only SUCCESS snapshots can be restored."
      when: snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].state != "SUCCESS"
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    - name: Pre-check - Display snapshot metadata
      debug:
        msg: |
          Snapshot Details:
            Name: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].snapshot }}
            State: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].state }}
            Start Time: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].start_time }}
            End Time: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].end_time }}
            Indices: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].indices | join(', ') }}
            Total Shards: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].shards.total }}
            Successful Shards: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].shards.successful }}
            Failed Shards: {{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].shards.failed }}
      tags:
        - restore
        - precheck

    # ============================================
    # FULL CLUSTER RESTORATION
    # ============================================
    - name: Full Restore - Close conflicting indices
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/{{ item }}/_close"
        method: POST
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 404
      loop: "{{ snapshot_details.json.snapshots[0].indices }}"
      when:
        - restore_profile == 'full_restore'
        - restore_indices == '*'
      ignore_errors: true
      tags:
        - restore
        - full

    - name: Full Restore - Execute full cluster restoration
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}/{{ actual_snapshot }}/_restore"
        method: POST
        body_format: json
        body:
          indices: "{{ snapshot_configuration.restore_profiles.full_restore.settings.indices }}"
          ignore_unavailable: "{{ snapshot_configuration.restore_profiles.full_restore.settings.ignore_unavailable }}"
          include_global_state: "{{ snapshot_configuration.restore_profiles.full_restore.settings.include_global_state }}"
          include_aliases: "{{ snapshot_configuration.restore_profiles.full_restore.settings.include_aliases }}"
          partial: "{{ snapshot_configuration.restore_profiles.full_restore.settings.partial }}"
          index_settings:
            index.number_of_replicas: 0
          ignore_index_settings:
            - "index.refresh_interval"
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 202
      register: full_restore_result
      when: restore_profile == 'full_restore'
      tags:
        - restore
        - full

    # ============================================
    # SELECTIVE INDEX RESTORATION
    # ============================================
    - name: Selective Restore - Execute selective index restoration
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}/{{ actual_snapshot }}/_restore"
        method: POST
        body_format: json
        body:
          indices: "{{ restore_indices }}"
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: false
          include_aliases: true
          partial: false
          rename_pattern: "(.+)"
          rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
          index_settings:
            index.number_of_replicas: 0
            index.refresh_interval: "30s"
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 202
      register: selective_restore_result
      when: restore_profile == 'selective_restore'
      tags:
        - restore
        - selective

    # ============================================
    # POINT IN TIME RESTORATION
    # ============================================
    - name: PIT Restore - Execute point-in-time restoration
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ restore_repository }}/{{ actual_snapshot }}/_restore"
        method: POST
        body_format: json
        body:
          indices: "{{ restore_indices }}"
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: false
          include_aliases: false
          partial: true
          rename_pattern: "(.+)"
          rename_replacement: "pit_$1"
          index_settings:
            index.number_of_replicas: 0
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 202
      register: pit_restore_result
      when: restore_profile == 'point_in_time_restore'
      tags:
        - restore
        - pit

    # ============================================
    # POST-RESTORATION MONITORING
    # ============================================
    - name: Post-restore - Wait for cluster to stabilize
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_cluster/health"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: post_health
      until: post_health.json.relocating_shards == 0
      retries: 60
      delay: 15
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

    - name: Post-restore - Monitor recovery progress
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_cat/recovery?v&active_only=true"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: recovery_progress
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

    - name: Post-restore - Display recovery status
      debug:
        msg: |
          Recovery Status:
          {{ recovery_progress.content }}
      when: recovery_progress.content | length > 0
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

    - name: Post-restore - Reset replica count
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_settings"
        method: PUT
        body_format: json
        body:
          index:
            number_of_replicas: 1
        status_code: 200
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

    - name: Post-restore - Final cluster health check
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_cluster/health?wait_for_status=green&timeout=120s"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: final_health
      ignore_errors: true
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

    - name: Post-restore - Display final status
      debug:
        msg: |
          === RESTORATION COMPLETE ===
          Cluster: {{ final_health.json.cluster_name }}
          Status: {{ final_health.json.status }}
          Active Shards: {{ final_health.json.active_shards }}
          Unassigned Shards: {{ final_health.json.unassigned_shards }}
      tags:
        - restore
        - postcheck

---
# Cleanup and maintenance playbook
# Save as: playbooks/snapshot-maintenance.yml

- name: Elasticsearch Snapshot Maintenance
  hosts: localhost
  gather_facts: true
  vars_files:
    - "../config/snapshot-config.yml"

  vars:
    es_host: "{{ snapshot_configuration.cluster.elasticsearch_hosts[0] }}"

  tasks:
    # ============================================
    # RETENTION MANAGEMENT
    # ============================================
    - name: Retention - Execute SLM retention
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/_execute_retention"
        method: POST
        status_code: 200
      register: retention_result
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - retention

    - name: Retention - Display retention execution result
      debug:
        var: retention_result
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - retention

    # ============================================
    # CLEANUP OPERATIONS
    # ============================================
    - name: Cleanup - Get all snapshots from filesystem repo
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.name }}/_all"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: all_fs_snapshots
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.enabled
      ignore_errors: true
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - cleanup

    - name: Cleanup - Identify failed snapshots
      set_fact:
        failed_snapshots: >-
          {{ all_fs_snapshots.json.snapshots |
             selectattr('state', 'equalto', 'FAILED') |
             map(attribute='snapshot') | list }}
      when:
        - all_fs_snapshots is success
        - all_fs_snapshots.json.snapshots is defined
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - cleanup

    - name: Cleanup - Delete failed snapshots
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.name }}/{{ item }}"
        method: DELETE
        status_code:
          - 200
          - 404
      loop: "{{ failed_snapshots | default([]) }}"
      when: failed_snapshots is defined and failed_snapshots | length > 0
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - cleanup

    - name: Cleanup - Display cleanup results
      debug:
        msg: "Deleted {{ failed_snapshots | default([]) | length }} failed snapshot(s)"
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - cleanup

    # ============================================
    # HEALTH REPORTING
    # ============================================
    - name: Report - Generate snapshot health report
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/stats"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: slm_report
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - report

    - name: Report - Get all SLM policy statuses
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_slm/policy"
        method: GET
        return_content: true
      register: policy_statuses
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - report

    - name: Report - Display comprehensive report
      debug:
        msg: |
          =======================================
          SNAPSHOT HEALTH REPORT
          Generated: {{ ansible_date_time.iso8601 }}
          =======================================

          SLM Statistics:
            Retention Runs: {{ slm_report.json.retention_runs | default(0) }}
            Retention Failed: {{ slm_report.json.retention_failed | default(0) }}
            Retention Timed Out: {{ slm_report.json.retention_timed_out | default(0) }}
            Retention Deletion Time: {{ slm_report.json.retention_deletion_time | default('N/A') }}
            Total Snapshots Taken: {{ slm_report.json.total_snapshots_taken | default(0) }}
            Total Snapshots Failed: {{ slm_report.json.total_snapshots_failed | default(0) }}
            Total Snapshots Deleted: {{ slm_report.json.total_snapshots_deleted | default(0) }}
            Total Snapshot Deletion Failures: {{ slm_report.json.total_snapshot_deletion_failures | default(0) }}

          Policy Details:
          {% for policy_name, policy_data in (policy_statuses.json | default({})).items() %}
            Policy: {{ policy_name }}
              Next Execution: {{ policy_data.next_execution_millis | default('N/A') }}
              Last Success: {{ policy_data.last_success.time | default('Never') }}
              Last Failure: {{ policy_data.last_failure.time | default('Never') }}
              Stats - Taken: {{ policy_data.stats.snapshots_taken | default(0) }}
              Stats - Failed: {{ policy_data.stats.snapshots_failed | default(0) }}
              Stats - Deleted: {{ policy_data.stats.snapshots_deleted | default(0) }}
          {% endfor %}
          =======================================
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - report

    # ============================================
    # REPOSITORY CLEANUP
    # ============================================
    - name: Maintenance - Clean up filesystem repository
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.name }}/_cleanup"
        method: POST
        status_code: 200
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.filesystem.enabled
      register: fs_cleanup
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - repo-cleanup

    - name: Maintenance - Clean up S3 repository
      uri:
        url: "{{ es_host }}/_snapshot/{{ snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.name }}/_cleanup"
        method: POST
        status_code: 200
      when: snapshot_configuration.repositories.s3_primary.enabled
      register: s3_cleanup
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - repo-cleanup

    - name: Maintenance - Display repository cleanup results
      debug:
        msg: |
          Repository cleanup completed:
          - Filesystem: {{ fs_cleanup.json | default('skipped') }}
          - S3: {{ s3_cleanup.json | default('skipped') }}
      tags:
        - maintenance
        - repo-cleanup

---
# CronJob for Kubernetes-based automated management
# Save as: k8s/snapshot-cronjobs.yml

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: es-snapshot-daily
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch-backup
    component: snapshot-manager
spec:
  schedule: "30 2 * * *"
  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 7
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      backoffLimit: 3
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 7200
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: elasticsearch-backup
            job-type: daily-snapshot
        spec:
          restartPolicy: OnFailure
          containers:
            - name: snapshot-creator
              image: curlimages/curl:latest
              env:
                - name: ES_HOST
                  valueFrom:
                    configMapKeyRef:
                      name: es-snapshot-config
                      key: elasticsearch_host
                - name: REPOSITORY
                  valueFrom:
                    configMapKeyRef:
                      name: es-snapshot-config
                      key: snapshot_repository
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - |
                  TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
                  SNAPSHOT_NAME="daily-snapshot-${TIMESTAMP}"

                  echo "=== Creating snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT_NAME} ==="

                  # Create snapshot
                  RESPONSE=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" -X PUT \
                    "${ES_HOST}/_snapshot/${REPOSITORY}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}?wait_for_completion=true" \
                    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
                    -d '{
                      "indices": "*",
                      "ignore_unavailable": true,
                      "include_global_state": true,
                      "metadata": {
                        "taken_by": "k8s-cronjob",
                        "reason": "daily-automated-backup",
                        "timestamp": "'${TIMESTAMP}'"
                      }
                    }')

                  HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | tail -1)
                  BODY=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | sed '$d')

                  echo "Response Code: ${HTTP_CODE}"
                  echo "Response Body: ${BODY}"

                  if [ "$HTTP_CODE" -eq 200 ]; then
                    echo "=== Snapshot created successfully ==="
                    exit 0
                  else
                    echo "=== ERROR: Snapshot creation failed ==="
                    exit 1
                  fi
              resources:
                requests:
                  memory: "64Mi"
                  cpu: "50m"
                limits:
                  memory: "128Mi"
                  cpu: "100m"

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: es-snapshot-retention-cleanup
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch-backup
    component: retention-manager
spec:
  schedule: "0 6 * * *"
  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      backoffLimit: 2
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: elasticsearch-backup
            job-type: retention-cleanup
        spec:
          restartPolicy: OnFailure
          containers:
            - name: retention-manager
              image: curlimages/curl:latest
              env:
                - name: ES_HOST
                  valueFrom:
                    configMapKeyRef:
                      name: es-snapshot-config
                      key: elasticsearch_host
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - |
                  echo "=== Executing SLM Retention ==="
                  curl -s -X POST "${ES_HOST}/_slm/_execute_retention"

                  echo ""
                  echo "=== Repository Cleanup ==="
                  curl -s -X POST "${ES_HOST}/_snapshot/fs_backup_repo/_cleanup"
                  curl -s -X POST "${ES_HOST}/_snapshot/s3_backup_repo/_cleanup"

                  echo ""
                  echo "=== SLM Stats ==="
                  curl -s "${ES_HOST}/_slm/stats" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || \
                    curl -s "${ES_HOST}/_slm/stats"

                  echo ""
                  echo "=== Retention cleanup completed ==="
              resources:
                requests:
                  memory: "64Mi"
                  cpu: "50m"
                limits:
                  memory: "128Mi"
                  cpu: "100m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-snapshot-config
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch-backup
data:
  elasticsearch_host: "http://elasticsearch-master:9200"
  snapshot_repository: "s3_backup_repo"
  backup_indices: "*"
  retention_days: "30"

---
# Elasticsearch keystore configuration for S3 credentials
# Save as: k8s/es-s3-secret.yml

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: es-s3-credentials
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
    component: snapshot-s3
type: Opaque
stringData:
  s3.client.default.access_key: "your-aws-access-key-id"
  s3.client.default.secret_key: "your-aws-secret-access-key"
